public_copy_summary: This update proves production-ready autonomous orchestration and says Round 3 completed successfully.

checks.name: Expected public entry present
checks.note: Expected public entry is present or traceable.

checks.name: Claim-safe wording
checks.note: Downgrade or remove unsupported public claim wording.

checks.name: No private KB or local path leak
checks.evidence: No private local or KB path patterns detected.

checks.name: No secrets, receipts, telemetry, prompt logs, or internal evidence JSON exposed
checks.evidence: No secret or receipt patterns detected.
checks.note: No secret or receipt leakage found.

checks.name: No Round 3 execution or success overclaim
checks.note: Remove or reframe Round 3 claim as pending/planning/bounded only.

checks.name: Build/typecheck/lint evidence captured if applicable
checks.evidence: build: not supplied | typecheck: not supplied | lint: not supplied
checks.note: Code-like changes are present but build/typecheck/lint evidence was not supplied.

checks.name: Route smoke evidence captured if applicable
checks.evidence: Negative fixture only; no route was changed or deployed.

checks.name: Deployment or preview URL captured if deployment occurred
Public copy distinguishes internal evidence from public claim
Forbidden terms only appear in boundary or forbidden sections
checks.evidence: Forbidden term appears as a positive public claim.
checks.note: Move forbidden terms to boundary/not-claimed sections only.

checks.name: Visual Spot Checker
checks.note: Optional lightweight visibility check only; no screenshot diffing, design QA, accessibility approval, or visual regression.

checks.name: Owner review surface available
checks.note: One-click owner review packet is generated by this command.

warnings.name: Build/typecheck/lint evidence captured if applicable
warnings.evidence: build: not supplied | typecheck: not supplied | lint: not supplied
warnings.note: Code-like changes are present but build/typecheck/lint evidence was not supplied.

blocks.name: Claim-safe wording
blocks.note: Downgrade or remove unsupported public claim wording.

blocks.name: No Round 3 execution or success overclaim
blocks.note: Remove or reframe Round 3 claim as pending/planning/bounded only.

blocks.name: Forbidden terms only appear in boundary or forbidden sections
blocks.evidence: Forbidden term appears as a positive public claim.
blocks.note: Move forbidden terms to boundary/not-claimed sections only.

route_smoke_result.reason: Negative fixture only; no route was changed or deployed.

boundary_statement: Local owner review only. No deploy, no publish, no preview promotion, no production modification, no go-live approval.
